source_question: Cho tôi danh sách sinh viên đã đăng ký môn Hệ điều hành trong học kỳ 2023-1.
source_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.full_name, m.major_name, s.cohort_year, s.gpa FROM students s JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Hệ điều hành' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-1' AND e.status = 'enrolled'

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Internet vạn vật còn chỗ vào Thứ 5 trong học kỳ 2024-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Internet vạn vật' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 5%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Nguyên lý marketing còn chỗ vào Thứ 5 trong học kỳ 2023-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Nguyên lý marketing' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 5%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Mạng máy tính còn chỗ vào Thứ 2 trong học kỳ 2024-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Mạng máy tính' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 2%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2023-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Cơ sở dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Cơ sở dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Cơ sở dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Cơ sở dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Phát triển ứng dụng web còn chỗ vào Thứ 5 trong học kỳ 2024-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Phát triển ứng dụng web' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 5%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Internet vạn vật còn chỗ vào Thứ 6 trong học kỳ 2023-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Internet vạn vật' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 6%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity
